title: Pollution Index Map
desc: React + Bootstrap website that lets users monitor the pollution index across Indonesian provinces using the OpenWeather API with longitude/latitude coordinates.

title: Pokemon Gallery
desc: Personal project built with React to explore API consumption using the PokeAPI as a data source.

title: QHealth Java Swing Project
desc: Java Swing desktop app built for an OOP assignment. Calculates Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) from user input and returns calorie needs with food recommendations.

title: RAAMEN Application
desc: ASP.NET restaurant management system built for a Software Design Patterns course. Supports customer ordering and admin features including transaction reports and menu management.

title: Linguanesia Python Project
desc: AI-powered sign language detector built with Python, MediaPipe, and OpenCV2 for real-time hand gesture recognition. Model trained via Google Teachable Machine.

title: KATEKIMA Project
desc: Laravel-based inventory management system for a stationery store, built as a Software Engineering course assignment.

title: Personal Website
desc: Portfolio website built with React and Tailwind CSS featuring interactive project cards and a responsive layout.

title: VERN - Vehicle Rental
desc: Full-stack vehicle rental platform built for a Web Programming final project. Integrated Google OAuth, Midtrans Payment Gateway, and Mailtrap Email Delivery on the backend.

title: GOTTH Auction
desc: Real-time auction website built with Golang, HTMX, and Templ to learn WebSockets in Go.
